level_1.name: Starting Stories
level_1.maps_to: RWI Red (All Set 1: single sounds + special friends + best friends)
level_1.note: All Set 1 sounds. Children at this level know all single-letter sounds, special friends (sh, th, ch, qu, ng, nk) and best friends (ff, ll, ss, zz, ck). CVC words with digraphs. Adding -s for plurals/verbs is permitted.
level_1.focus_description: All Set 1 sounds complete. CVC words plus consonant digraphs. First decodable books for children who have completed initial phonics instruction.

level_2.name: Longer Sounds
level_2.maps_to: RWI Green + Purple (Set 2: long vowel sounds)
level_2.note: ow = blow/snow pronunciation. oo covers both zoo (long) and look (short) pronunciations. No consonant clusters yet.
level_2.word_structure: CVC + all digraphs + vowel digraphs (no consonant clusters)
level_2.focus_description: Set 2 long vowel sounds: ay, ee, igh, ow(blow), oo(zoo/look), ar, or, air, ir, ou, oy. Each book focuses on 2-3 new sounds.

level_3.name: New Spellings
level_3.maps_to: RWI Pink + Orange (Early Set 3: split digraphs + first alternatives + consonant clusters unlocked)
level_3.note: Split digraphs are the key feature (a-e, i-e, o-e, u-e). Alternative spelling awareness begins: ay/a-e/ai, ee/ea, igh/i-e/ie, ow/o-e/oa, oi/oy, or/aw. Consonant clusters (CCVC, CVCC, CCVCC) are now unlocked.
level_3.word_structure: Split digraphs, alternative spellings, consonant clusters (CCVC, CVCC, CCVCC)
level_3.focus_description: Split digraphs (a-e, i-e, o-e, u-e) + first alternative spellings (ea, oi, aw, ai, oa, ie). Consonant clusters unlocked. Children learn same sound can be spelled different ways.

level_4.name: Building Fluency
level_4.maps_to: RWI Yellow (Later Set 3 alternatives + fluency building)
level_4.note: ow now has BOTH pronunciations: blow (Set 2) and cow (new). Additional alternatives: air/are, ir/ur/er, oo/u-e/ue/ew. Fluency building with longer reads and multi-syllable words.
level_4.word_structure: All previous patterns + multi-syllable words begin
level_4.focus_description: Later Set 3 alternatives (are, ur, er, ew, ue, ow-cow). Fluency building with longer reads. Multi-syllable words introduced.

level_5.name: Reading Together
level_5.note: Final Set 3 sounds complete the core phonics code. Comprehension becomes a key focus alongside decoding. Longer, more complex narratives.
level_5.word_structure: Complex patterns, multi-syllable words, comprehension focus
level_5.focus_description: Final Set 3 sounds (ore, oor, ire, ear, ure, tion). Comprehension becomes key focus alongside decoding. Longer narratives with emotional depth.

level_6.name: Reading Champion
level_6.note: Suffix patterns for multi-syllable words. Full phonics code now covered. Independent reading with complex vocabulary. All alternative spellings mastered.
level_6.word_structure: Complex multi-syllable words, suffixes, all alternative spellings, independent reading
level_6.focus_description: Suffix patterns (ous/cious/tious, able/ible). Full phonics code mastered. Independent reading with complex multi-syllable vocabulary.
